name: Free Skate
author: Poki
description: Free Skate is a cool skateboarding game where you ride through a big, lively city as the ultimate skate boy! Speed through streets, jump high, pull off awesome stunts, and explore every corner while completing missions and collecting stars. Watch out for traffic and don’t get hit by cars! Upgrade your gear to skate faster and smoother as you level up your skills. Ready to roll, jump, and rule the city? How to play Free Skate? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Reverse: S or the down arrow key Turn: A/D or left and right arrow keys Jump: the space bar Who created Free Skate? Free Skate is created by Sleepless Games. Play their other games on Poki: Snow Riders ! How can I play Free Skate for free? You can play Free Skate for free on Poki. Can I play Free Skate on mobile devices and desktop? Free Skate can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
